title: zeltnera muehlenbergii
intro: Zeltnera muehlenbergii, also known as the Muhlenberg's leafy mint, is a perennial wildflower native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to aid in treating wounds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Zeltnera muehlenbergii are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Zeltnera muehlenbergii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
